frontmatter.title: Enablement
frontmatter.description: Enablement materials for Cúram by Merative™

internal.content:
---
title: Enablement
description: Enablement materials for Cúram by Merative™ 
---

Cúram by Merative™ enablement materials provide deep dive presentations on new features and changes in each release.


As of 23rd July 2026 all releases will have product documentation on S-Drive. 
In addition, documentation for 8.2.2.0 (3rd July 2026) and Curam Action View 1.0.0 (25th June 2026) will also be availale on S-Drive.

### To access any information referenced on this page, please contact [Merative Support](https://merative.my.site.com/mysupport/s/) 

## Cúram Action View enablement

- Cúram Action View Implementation Guide 1.0.0​


## 8.2.2.0 enablement

- Citizen Engagement Enhancements 8.2.2.0
- Cúram Enhancements 8.2.2.0

## HR1 Medicaid Community Engagement Cartridge enablement​

- HR1 Medicaid Community Engagement Cartridge 1.1.0 


## 8.2.1.0 enablement

- Citizen Engagement Enhancements 8.2.1.0
- Cúram Enhancements 8.2.1.0

## 8.2.0.0 enablement

- Citizen Engagement Enhancements 8.2.0.0
- Cúram Enhancements 8.2.0.0


## 8.1.3.0 enablement

- Citizen Engagement Enhancements 8.1.3.0
- Technical Enhancements 8.1.3.0


## 8.1.2.0 enablement

- Citizen Engagement Enhancements 8.1.2.0
- Technical Enhancements 8.1.2.0


## 8.1.1.0 enablement

- Person Evidence Management Enablement

## 8.1.0.0 enablement

- Technical Enhancements 8.1.0.0

## 8.0.3.0 enablement
